title: Didomi Consent Event
description: A single consent / preference event captured by the Didomi platform via POST /v1/consents/events. Represents the act of a user granting, denying, or modifying consent or marketing preferences against one or more purposes / vendors under a given regulatory regime.

id.description: Server-assigned identifier for the consent event record.

organization_id.description: Didomi organization identifier that owns this event.

notice_id.description: Identifier of the consent notice that produced this event.

user.description: End-user the consent event applies to.

id.description: Stable user identifier (typically a UUID or pseudonymous id).

type.description: Whether the id is a Didomi-managed id or a customer-owned external id.

region.description: ISO 3166-2 subdivision code (used for US-state regulations).

regulation.description: Regulatory regime under which consent was captured.

consent_string.description: Encoded IAB TCF v2 / IAB GPP / Didomi consent string for the choice set.

events.description: Per-purpose / per-vendor consent decisions captured in this event.

purpose.description: Didomi purpose id, IAB TCF purpose number, or vendor-scoped purpose.

value.description: Boolean state for the purpose / vendor (true = consent granted).

source.description: Captures the source surface (web, mobile, CTV, AMP) and SDK version that produced the event.
